content: HDBSCAN: two implementations. Standalone hdbscan pkg 0.8.44 (2026-06-01, maintained) vs sklearn.cluster.HDBSCAN (in scikit-learn since 1.3; current sklearn 1.9.0, 2026-06-02). Results differ: sklearn min_samples counts the point itself (use +1 to match), cluster_selection_epsilon behaviour differs. sklearn version lacks soft clustering/approximate_predict. Since scikit-learn is needed anyway for the agglomerative fallback, sklearn.cluster.HDBSCAN drops one compiled dependency; Sift does not need soft clustering.
